title: Draft RBI (Regional Rural Banks – Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI introduces annual IFR assessment instead of continuous compliance for RRBs. The change reduces operational burden while maintaining prudential safeguards.
The post Draft RBI (Regional Rural Banks – Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
